category_sources: source_facts.description: Kubernetes object analysis recommendations for improved reliability and security; official README calls it static code analysis for Kubernetes object definitions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official README heading use kube-score.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface; repository links to kube-score.com as official site/demo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/zegl/kube-score, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes Kubernetes object static analysis and recommendations for security/resilience; source_facts.executables lists kube-score.
